title: Fix code block formatting for image URL
author: tubby864
pr_body_excerpt: Correct formatting for image URL section in quick-start.md fix this stupid color ^

gist.headline: Polishing the docs
gist.blurb: Squashed a tiny formatting bug in the quick start guide. The image URL code blocks are looking crisp and readable again.
gist.summary: Fixed a markdown formatting issue in the quick-start guide to ensure image URLs display with the correct syntax highlighting.
gist.impact: Developers reading the quick-start guide will see properly formatted code blocks for image URLs.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee fixing a glowing text document or painting over a weirdly colored line of code, representing a small documentation formatting fix.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, carefully painting a glowing line of code on a giant retro document. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
